summary: PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION VERIFIED: All 8 admin sidebar sections load within the 1-second target (actual: 69-102ms active feedback). No random page reloads, URL state preserved after F5 refresh, all functional tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Performance optimizations working correctly - handleSectionChange in AdminLayout.js changes section FIRST, then marks badge seen in background (fire-and-forget)
fetchUsers in App.js now only runs when users section is active (not on every AdminDashboard mount)
toastRef pattern in AdminKYC.js prevents useCallback recreation cascade
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance optimization testing complete. All sidebar sections load in <1 second. Previous bug fix (page reload after delete) still working correctly from iteration_106.

performance_test_results.target: Perceived load time <= 1 second for all sidebar sections
performance_test_results.test_method: Measured time from sidebar click to active state feedback

f5_refresh_url_preservation.details: URL section=ledger preserved after F5 refresh, sidebar active state maintained
